reasoning: The question requires the Global Protest Tracker to report a 10,000+ participant protest in South Korea with a start date AFTER the launch of the question (approx. mid-January 2025). While massive protests (up to 110,000 people) are currently taking place in Q1 2025, these are part of the movement triggered by President Yoon's martial law declaration in December 2024. The Global Protest Tracker groups protests by major 'episodes' or 'movements'. A recently published article by Carnegie (April 7, 2025) discusses the latest tracker update and explicitly links the South Korean mobilization to the December 2024 martial law trigger, indicating the start date will be recorded as December 2024, thereby failing the 'after launch' criterion. Furthermore, since the tracker just received an update in early April 2025, it is highly unlikely to be updated again with a brand new qualifying protest episode before the July 1, 2025 resolution deadline.
